creator: Alexander Terp
description:
Using null as a map key triggers an internal panic with "Cannot key on a null" and a Go stack trace. Rad itself marks this as "This is a bug in Rad." Should produce a clean user-facing error.

**Repro:**
```
m = {}
m[null] = "value"   // Panic: Cannot key on a null

m2 = {null: "value"}  // Same panic
```

**Test files:** `bugs/operators/103_map_key_null_string.rad`, `bugs/collections/19_map_dynamic_keys.rad`, `72_null_key_map_literal.rad`
title: Null as map key causes Go panic instead of clean error
